completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 4 binaries (server, cellar, manager, cfru5102_read). Primary: backend, secondary: desktop + embedded.
Found spec.md, example configs, PlantUML diagrams, systemd units. No existing generated docs.
Tech stack: Go 1.26, gRPC/protobuf, SQLite (modernc), Qt6 (miqt), CF-RU5102 RFID, sysfs LEDs
Exhaustive scan: 50 Go files, 1 proto, 2 systemd units, 8 PlantUML diagrams. 17 gRPC endpoints, 6 DB tables, full RFID driver with 20+ commands.
Source tree documented with annotated directory structure and critical folders
Development guide written: prerequisites, build, run, test, deploy instructions
Architecture documentation written: system design, components, data model, API, deployment
Supporting docs written: project-overview, data-models, api-contracts
Master index generated with links to all 7 docs + existing documentation
Validation passed: no incomplete markers, all files present, 985 total lines
